title: Resource APIs, Pagination, Idempotency, and Concurrency Control · Spiral Systems Review
summary: A delayed operations handoff reconstructs resource apis, pagination, idempotency, and concurrency control from bounded request and server evidence, challenges one retained misconception, and revises the stable resource and mutation consistency contract. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for stable resource and mutation consistency contract after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define stable transport schemas, domain models, persistence records, optional and null semantics, field ownership, and evolution boundaries separately.
Build opaque cursor pagination from a unique stable order, bound page size, preserve filters and authorization, and test inserts and deletes between pages.
Scope and validate idempotency keys, bind request fingerprints, serialize first execution, persist terminal outcome, expire records, and reject mismatched replay.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Go server Separate evidence from confidence · Review Partial Update Field Authority
steps.instruction:
review case — A review team handles case 4266 in a internal administrative API crossing two trust zones. Build deterministic Go evidence to separate optimistic version conflicts from valid idempotency replay; then change the tenant and show deny-by-default before repository access. Browser code models decisions only. Listener, TLS, database, proxy, race, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Model PATCH semantics, missing versus explicit zero or null, immutable and server-owned fields, property authorization, atomic validation, and response evidence.

Inspect the Partial Update Field Authority trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Go server Separate evidence from confidence · Review Partial Update Field Authority.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for model patch semantics, missing versus explicit zero or null, immutable and server-owned fields, property authorization, atomic validation, and response evidence. For Go server Separate evidence from confidence · Review Partial Update Field Authority, keep Partial Update Field Authority connected to executable HTTP client decision evidence.
